title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3 as a world model for robotics trained on multimodal video, audio, text, and action data. Vera serves as a new CPU layer for AI agents. Isaac GR00T is a reference humanoid robot platform. Together they form a complete software and hardware stack for physical AI applications.
